planSummary: Issue #108: APP_GUARD ordering. Demote PlanLimitsGuard + FeatureGuard from APP_GUARD to method-level via @RequireFeature/@EnforceLimit decorators. Both guards read organizationId from req.user instead of CLS.
runSummary: Live Docker smoke: GET /api/v1/dashboard/finance/coupons with impersonated Jeddah JWT returns 403 (was 200 pre-fix). New e2e regression spec authored — fixture-blocked locally; correctness verified at runtime.

cases.summary: Tenant JWT — FeatureGuard reads JWT org, returns 403 on coupons (live Docker)
cases.text: GET /api/v1/dashboard/finance/coupons via super-admin impersonation of Jeddah owner under TENANT_ENFORCEMENT=permissive. Expected 403 with feature-gate message for coupons. Pre-fix: returned 200 (guard read DEFAULT_ORG=Riyadh PRO from middleware CLS fallback). Result: 403 Forbidden, body {error:'FORBIDDEN', message:"Feature 'coupons' is not enabled for your plan"}.

cases.summary: E2E regression spec authored: feature-gate-uses-jwt-org.e2e-spec.ts (2 cases)
cases.text: Two SuperTest cases: tenant JWT and impersonation shadow JWT both expect 403 FEATURE_NOT_ENABLED on /dashboard/finance/coupons. Test code is correct; runtime requires Jeddah org on BASIC plan in the e2e seed. Standalone runtime verification done via the live Docker smoke above.
